channel.title: Arne's website
channel.description: A virtual proof that name is awesome!

item.title: Bienvenu, Welcome, Wilkommen, Tere tulemast!
item.description: On this website, I am going to try to organize and collect all the projects I have worked on, associated also with my travels, stories from life in Estonia, Germany and France. I try to build this website over the time and hopefully keep it fresh!
